svg.title: Gaussian wave packet uncertainty: reciprocal widths in position and momentum space
svg.desc: A 2-by-2 grid of Gaussian probability density curves. Top row shows position space, bottom row shows momentum space. Left column shows state A: narrow in position (small delta-x), correspondingly wide in momentum (large delta-p). Right column shows state B: wide in position (large delta-x), correspondingly narrow in momentum (small delta-p). Width brackets at half-maximum confirm the reciprocal relationship, illustrating the minimum-uncertainty Gaussian satisfies delta-x times delta-p equals hbar over 2.

cajal:figure.figure-title: Gaussian wave packet: reciprocal position and momentum widths
cajal:figure.author: Humanitarians AI Incorporated

svg.text: Gaussian minimizes Δx⋅Δp = ℏ/2; narrowing one inevitably widens the other
